prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: STRUCTURE SOLUTION AND REFINEMENT OF THE RECOMBINANT HUMAN SALIVARY AMYLASE. Entity description: ALPHA-AMYLASE. Organism: Homo sapiens. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived low-complexity tendency high; sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; withheld discovery hints: hard_topology_word_withheld:soluble_beta_barrel_vs_membrane_barrel. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V69 E65 metadata context marks: assembly_context cofactor_context ligand_context metal_context oligomer_context partner_copy_context. Known E65 marks are allowed; hard-topology discovery labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.

v69_context_policy.context_derivation: V69 E65 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. It carries established E65 marks but withholds hard-topology missing-word labels from prediction context so V69 can discover them.
